title: ATLAS · Breadth zone-crossing events
description: Chronological log of breadth oscillator zone crossings (entered/exited OB or OS, crossed midline) for a given universe and indicator family. Powers the Signal history table on §10 Breadth Terminal (spec §10 block 7, design-principles §16). Every narrative claim in the Interpretation sidecar (design-principles §15) must be backed by a row in this table. Stage 2 source: `/api/v1/stocks/breadth/zone-events?universe=X&range=5y`.

universe.description: Universe identifier this zone-event log belongs to. Broad indices use the bare slug; sector-scoped universes use the `sector:{slug}` shape.

data_as_of.description: Most recent session included when the log was built. Matches the associated breadth_daily_5y `data_as_of`.

thresholds.description: Zone thresholds used when classifying events. All values are absolute counts (not percentages) against the universe size.

overbought.description: OB threshold — crossings at or above this count are `entered_ob` / `exited_ob`. Default for Nifty 500 = 400.

midline.description: Midline — crossings here emit `crossed_midline_up` / `crossed_midline_down`. Default for Nifty 500 = 250.

oversold.description: OS threshold — crossings at or below this count are `entered_os` / `exited_os`. Default for Nifty 500 = 100.

events.description: Chronological list of zone events, ascending by `date`. Typical 5Y window yields 20–60 events across all three indicators.

date.description: Trading session on which the crossing was confirmed (edge-triggered: `prevCount → count` transition).

universe.description: Universe identifier (repeated per-row for CSV-exported slices). Must match the top-level `universe`.

indicator.description: Which moving-average family this crossing was observed on.

event_type.description: Edge-triggered event classification. `entered_ob` = count upcrossed OB; `exited_ob` = count downcrossed OB; `entered_os` = count downcrossed OS; `exited_os` = count upcrossed OS; midline crossings are directional.

value.description: Absolute breadth count observed on `date` at the moment of the crossing.

prior_zone_duration_days.description: Number of trading sessions spent in `prior_zone` immediately before this event. 0 is legal (back-to-back crossings).

prior_zone.description: Zone the count was in immediately before this crossing. `neutral` = strictly between OS and OB thresholds.
